title: Roasted Squash Tagine
description: A hearty North African-inspired stew made with roasted squash and wholesome ingredients.
instructions: Cut the squash in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds.
Place the squash cut-side up on a baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes.
In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the roasted red peppers, beef broth, and tagine spice blend. Stir to combine.
Add the roasted squash to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the squash is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot.
